title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Persistent Systems

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Persistent Systems
jsonLd.description:
Persistent Systems, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Persistent Systems:
Persistent Systems is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems!
